y2artisan 0.8.3

  • Changelog

Add base Qualtrics colors

add_colors_qualtrics_y2.Rd

4 Qualtrics colors: PURPLE, GREEN, BLUE, and TEAL

Usage

add_colors_qualtrics_y2(
  palette = 2,
  case = c("upper", "lower"),
  show_colors = TRUE
)

Arguments

palette

DEFAULT = 2. Defaults to the newest Qualtrics color palette (2). Switch between the latest color palette and older color palettes, with 1 being the oldest.

case

DEFAULT = 'upper'. Arg available only for palette 1. Will set color vectors to uppercase (e.g. BLUE_DARK) Can switch to 'lower' to revert to lowercase (e.g. blue_dark; older package versions were lowercase)

show_colors

DEFAULT = TRUE Show the color palettes loaded into your environment

Details

Adds to your environment pre-set hex codes for the 4 base colors typically used in Qualtrics projects. Each of the 4 colors has 5 shades. Also adds grays, black, and white.

Examples

add_colors_qualtrics_y2()

add_colors_qualtrics_y2('lower')

On this page

Developed by Nick Moffitt, Pearce Solomon, Canyen Heimuli, Megan Gilchrist, Julia Ostrander, Y2 Analytics.
